paper_title: LITMUS∞: SMT-Verified Memory Model Portability Checking for Cross-Architecture Concurrent Code

paper_claims.reproducible_command: cd litmus_inf && python3 -c "from portcheck import PATTERNS; print(len(PATTERNS))"

paper_claims.claim: 1,400/1,400 Z3 certificate coverage (597 UNSAT proofs + 803 SAT witnesses, zero timeouts)
1,400/1,400 cross-solver agreement across Z3 and CVC5 (Wilson CI [99.7%, 100%])
LLM-assisted recognition: 85.0% exact-match on 113 adversarial OOD snippets across 12 domains (GPT-4.1), Wilson CI [77.2%, 90.5%]
993 Alethe UNSAT proofs + 407 SAT models verified
228/228 herd7 internal consistency for CPU models
96.6% exact-match, 97.0% top-3 on 203 curated benchmark snippets
35/41 (85.4%) real-world bug coverage; 100% of memory-ordering bugs
Independent benchmark: 0% AST-only exact-match on 33 independently sourced snippets
Severity classification: 689 data_race, 44 security, 70 benign (803 unsafe pairs)

paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/litmus_check.py, litmus_inf/setup.py. Install from source only.

paper_claims.claim: 113-snippet adversarial OOD benchmark across 12 domains; AST-only accuracy 6.2% (Wilson CI [2.8%, 12.3%])
DSL-to-.cat mismatch fully characterized: isolated (1/13 asymmetric-fence patterns), false negative direction, minimal practical impact
Pattern composition: 29 composite tests beyond 140-pattern ceiling; 354 BMC hazards found

honesty_notes.pattern_level_scope: 140 fixed patterns + pattern composition/BMC for beyond-140 exploration. Cannot discover arbitrary novel bugs.
honesty_notes.cross_solver: Z3 and CVC5 (independent solver): 1,400/1,400 agreement. TCB substantially reduced.
honesty_notes.llm_recognition: LLM affects recall only; all verdicts SMT-certified. Requires OPENAI_API_KEY. 85.0% on 113 OOD snippets (GPT-4.1).
honesty_notes.smt_internal_consistency: Both encodings by same authors. Internal consistency, not independent validation.
honesty_notes.gpu_validation: 94/94 external cross-validation against published specs. Not hardware-tested.
honesty_notes.herd7_agreement: 228/228 against pre-computed expected outcomes. Internal consistency.
honesty_notes.benchmark: 203 curated snippets (96.6% exact); 113 adversarial OOD snippets (6.2% AST-only, 85.0% with LLM). LLM mode addresses gap.
honesty_notes.bug_coverage: 35/41 (85.4%) documented concurrency bugs covered. 100% of memory-ordering bugs.
honesty_notes.fence_costs: Analytical weight reductions, not measured hardware latencies.
honesty_notes.mechanization: Lean 4 proof sketches with sorry'd subgoals. Full mechanization is future work.
honesty_notes.severity_taxonomy: CWE-calibrated. Not validated against specific CVE instances.
honesty_notes.no_pypi: pip install from source only, not published to PyPI.
honesty_notes.dsl_cat_mismatch: 170/171 DSL-to-.cat correspondence. Single mismatch (mp_fence_wr on RISC-V) fully characterized: false negative direction, isolated (1/13 asymmetric-fence patterns), minimal practical impact.
honesty_notes.pattern_composition: Pattern composition, chains, rings, and BMC generate 29 composite tests beyond the 140-pattern ceiling. 354 BMC hazards found.

reproduction_instructions.compile_paper: cd litmus_inf && pdflatex paper.tex && pdflatex paper.tex
